name: otter-ai
description: Search and analyze Otter meeting archives

interface.shortDescription: Search and analyze Otter meeting archives
interface.longDescription: Access and analyze a user’s Otter.ai meeting archive by searching meetings via metadata (time range, participants, folders, channels) or transcript keywords, then optionally retrieving full transcripts with speaker attribution. Use it to review past discussions, identify decisions and action items, and synthesize information across personal or enterprise meeting histories.
